issues.detail: The skill does not cover all potential error scenarios and edge cases, such as missing scheme or project path, leading to incomplete guidance.
The skill is limited to macOS with Xcode and XcodeBuildMCP, making it vendor-locked and not cross-platform.
No realistic examples are provided to illustrate usage, making it difficult to understand how to apply the skill.

scenarios.name: Build, run and verify iOS app on booted simulator
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows list_sims -> session-set-defaults -> build_run_sim -> describe_ui/screenshot verification using XcodeBuildMCP tools; baseline reaches for xcrun simctl and xcodebuild directly, bypassing the MCP toolchain the skill exists to leverage.

scenarios.name: Tap button and capture logs in simulator
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls describe_ui, taps by id/label, and brackets with start_sim_log_cap/stop_sim_log_cap on the bundle id; baseline uses xcrun simctl io ... and log stream without the structured UI inspection step.
